growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: engqvist.
growth_records.notes: Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.medium: Peptone cellulose solution (PCS) medium with CMC

up.method: experimentally measured glucose uptake rate vs dry cell biomass; used to constrain GEM; numeric value reported in Table S5 (supplementary, not in main text)

growth_records.cite: Kundu, Pritam et al. Genome-Scale Community Model-Guided Development of Bacterial Coculture for Lignocellulose Bioconversion. Biotechnology and Bioengineering (2025). DOI:10.1002/bit.28918. [PMC11895418]
growth_records.snippet: P4 Oceanobacillus sojae P4 ... Experimental growth rate Mean 0.075 SD 0.0098
growth_records.notes: Table 1: experimental growth rate (h^-1) mean=0.075 SD=0.0098 for Oceanobacillus sojae P4; in-silico FBA growth rate=0.069 h^-1. Doubling time td=ln2/mu=0.6931/0.075=9.242 h. Aerobic batch shake-flask in PCS medium (0.5% peptone, 0.5% NaCl, 0.1% yeast extract, 0.15% CaCO3, 0.5% cellulosic material), pH 7.2, 37C, 120 rpm, 72 h. Glucose uptake rate measured experimentally per strain to constrain models (Table S5) but numeric value not in main text. Strain isolated from wood-feeding termite gut.

growth_records.medium: Peptone cellulose solution (PCS) medium with CMC

up.method: per-strain experimental glucose uptake used to constrain member GEMs (Table S5); community value not tabulated

growth_records.cite: Kundu, Pritam et al. Genome-Scale Community Model-Guided Development of Bacterial Coculture for Lignocellulose Bioconversion. Biotechnology and Bioengineering (2025). DOI:10.1002/bit.28918. [PMC11895418]
growth_records.method: reported (experimentally measured community growth rate, SD=0.031 h^-1)
growth_records.snippet: Oceanobacillus sojae P4 + Brevibacterium sp. P5 ... Community growth (h-1) 0.321 SD 0.031 ; Sum of individual 0.283 ; DES 1.134
growth_records.notes: Table 2: experimental community (co-culture) growth rate=0.321 h^-1 (SD 0.031); sum of individual monoculture growth rates=0.283 h^-1 (SD 0.013). Doubling time td=ln2/mu=0.6931/0.321=2.159 h. Model-derived Avg PGSI=0.015, Avg PMA=0.089; experimental degree of enzymatic synergism DES=1.134. Growth increment vs sum-of-individuals is the synergism metric. Aerobic batch shake-flask coculture in PCS-CMC medium, pH 7.2, 37C, 120 rpm, 72 h.
